parameters.query: =SELECT id FROM campaign_activity WHERE metadata->>'heyreach_event_id' = '{{ $json.heyreach_event_id }}' LIMIT 1

=SELECT id, email, first_name, last_name, linkedin_url FROM contacts WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(REPLACE(linkedin_url, 'https://', ''), 'http://', '')) ILIKE '%{{ $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.normalized_linkedin_url }}%' LIMIT 1

=INSERT INTO contacts (first_name, last_name, email, linkedin_url, company, job_title, lifecycle_stage)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.first_name }}',
  '{{ $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.last_name }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.email }}', ''),
  '{{ $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.original_linkedin_url }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.company }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.job_title }}', ''),
  'lead'
)
RETURNING id, email, first_name, last_name, linkedin_url

WITH ensure_campaign_contact AS (
  INSERT INTO campaign_contacts (campaign_id, contact_id, status, entered_at)
  VALUES (
    'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890',
    '{{ $json.contact_id }}',
    'active',
    NOW()
  )
  ON CONFLICT (campaign_id, contact_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
campaign_contact AS (
  SELECT id FROM ensure_campaign_contact
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id FROM campaign_contacts 
  WHERE contact_id = '{{ $json.contact_id }}' 
    AND campaign_id = 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890'
  LIMIT 1
),
ensure_channel AS (
  INSERT INTO campaign_contact_channels (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id, status)
  VALUES (
    (SELECT id FROM campaign_contact LIMIT 1),
    'cc111111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777',
    'active'
  )
  ON CONFLICT (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT id FROM campaign_contact LIMIT 1) as campaign_contact_id,
  (SELECT id FROM ensure_channel) as campaign_contact_channel_id,
  'cc111111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777' as campaign_channel_id

=INSERT INTO campaign_activity (
  campaign_contact_id,
  campaign_channel_id,
  activity_type,
  channel,
  activity_at,
  metadata
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.campaign_contact_id }}',
  '{{ $json.campaign_channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.mapped_activity_type }}',
  'linkedin',
  '{{ $json.timestamp }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    heyreach_event_id: $json.heyreach_event_id,
    message_text: $json.message_text,
    raw_event_type: $json.event_type,
    heyreach_campaign_id: $json.heyreach_campaign_id,
    is_new_contact: $json.is_new_contact
  }) }}'
)
RETURNING id

=UPDATE campaign_contacts
SET 
  updated_at = NOW(),
  total_touches = total_touches + 1,
  last_touch_at = NOW(),
  first_touch_at = COALESCE(first_touch_at, NOW()),
  first_engagement_at = CASE 
    WHEN first_engagement_at IS NULL AND '{{ $json.is_reply_event }}' = 'true' THEN NOW()
    ELSE first_engagement_at
  END
WHERE id = '{{ $json.campaign_contact_id }}'

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  reply_sentiment = '{{ $json.classification }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}'

=INSERT INTO campaign_activity (
  activity_type,
  channel,
  metadata
) VALUES (
  'webhook_received',
  'system',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    error: "Invalid LinkedIn URL",
    raw_url: $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.original_linkedin_url,
    event_type: $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.event_type,
    heyreach_event_id: $('Normalize LinkedIn URL').first().json.heyreach_event_id
  }) }}'
)
